title: Let's build something
description: Got a project in mind? Send me a message — I'd love to hear about it and see how we can make it happen.
copyright: Built with ❤️ and modern web tech.
builtWith: Built with React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS

privacy.label: Privacy
privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.intro: This portfolio has no ads or invasive trackers. Basic visit stats help me improve the site.
points: Analytics: Plausible (self-hosted subdomain, EU infrastructure), no cookies — aggregate page views and similar metrics only; outbound link clicks may be counted in aggregate. See https://plausible.io/privacy.
No contact form — if you email me, it goes through your email provider.
Your theme and language choice may be saved locally in your browser (localStorage).
External links (e.g. GitHub/LinkedIn) follow their own privacy policies.
